data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The platform minimizes cognitive load by simplifying user choices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Spotify ensures that important functions are easily accessible.
data.technical_spec: Key actions can be performed with minimal physical effort.

data.title: Jacob's Law
data.description: The interface is designed to conform to user expectations based on other apps.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design patterns found in similar music applications.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that are related in function are grouped together.
data.technical_spec: Playlists and controls are strategically placed for user convenience.

data.title: Law of Similarity
data.description: Visually similar elements are perceived as related, enhancing usability.
data.technical_spec: Coherent color schemes and typography guide user perception.
